title: Job Opening Category Manager at Noise Global Group

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Category Manager at Noise Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Noise Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Howrah location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Noise Global Group:
Noise Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Noise Global Group!
